commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the active-requester early return in `sendSubagentAnnounceDirectly` and updates the focused regression expectation so delivery falls through to `callGateway` before queue fallback.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main has a focused test and implementation branch where an active Telegram requester that cannot be woken returns before `callGateway`. I did not run tests in this read-only review.
